hero.tagline: A relaxing escape for all your senses
hero.title: SEN SPA Da Nang
hero.subtitle: A relaxing escape for all your senses, in the heart of Da Nang.

about.description:
Founded in 2023 with the aim to provide a relaxing spa experience for both travelers and local residents.
Located in the heart of the city, we take pride in our team of professional, highly skilled therapists.
SEN SPA Da Nang offers a wide range of foot and body therapies, facial care, as well as spa packages.

locations.title: OUR LOCATIONS
locations.subtitle: We currently offer services at the following locations

featuredProducts.title: FEATURED PRODUCTS
featuredProducts.subtitle: Discover our exclusive spa packages and special offers

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose SEN SPA Da Nang?
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Visit SEN SPA Da Nang and take a heavenly break from your daily routine or pamper yourself nicely after a long trip.

couples.title: Perfect for couples, groups, and solo travelers
couples.description: Whether you're traveling alone, or on a honeymoon, or even with young kids, we always have something to offer.

location.title: Convenient and central location
location.description: All our spas are just a short walk from iconic landmarks of Da Nang such as Dragon Bridge, Han River, and Con Market.

service.title: Skilled therapists and attentive receptionists
service.description: Be warmly welcomed and expertly cared for by friendly staff from start to finish.
